summary: local-mcp performs install-time download and execution from external endpoints with system-info collection
details: The package ships three reachable scripts (download.js, index.js, setup.js) that combine require('child_process'), require('os'), require('fs'), require('https')/require('http'), and process.env reads with HTTP requests to externally-hosted endpoints including https://office-mcp-production.up.railway.app (a Railway-hosted service) and https://download.local-mcp.com / https://local-mcp.com. download.js performs an https.get fetch in code that also imports child_process and fs (write-and-execute shape); index.js issues http.get/https.get calls to office-mcp-production.up.railway.app while reading process.env and process.platform; setup.js issues multiple POST requests over https alongside child_process and os imports. The combination of arbitrary external Railway-hosted endpoint + system-info collection (os, process.env, process.platform) + child_process + filesystem writes across an install/download/setup script triplet is the canonical install-time fetch-collect-execute shape. The download.local-mcp.com endpoint is publisher-aligned but the office-mcp-production.up.railway.app destination is an unverified third-party-hosted service receiving installer environment data, and the same script set executes downloaded content via child_process.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
